title: CTE Teacher (Foods, Sewing, and CCA)
status: Full Time, 1 FTEcourses include Sewing, Foods, Child Development, Interior Design, and CCAMinimum Requirements:An Active Utah Secondary Education or CTE Teaching License with applicable EndorsementFor information regarding the types of classes that may be taught under this position, please click on the following linkWCSD CTE Career Clusters, then select the position/career cluster.The salary for this position is assigned to the TT Salary Schedule.To view the salary schedule, please select the following linkTT Salary Schedule.For new hires & rehires, WCSD will recognize no more than thirteen full time, complete years of previous teaching experience when placing on the TT Salary Schedule.
